/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/NexusLauncher.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/NexusLauncher.dir/NexusLauncher_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NexusLauncher.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NexusLauncher.dir/LauncherWindow.cpp.o -o NexusLauncher  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
